description: A new product version requires a database schema migration that must be applied during a scheduled maintenance window.

nodes.task_description: Announce the scheduled maintenance on the status page and in-app.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs customers of the upcoming downtime.

nodes.task_description: During the maintenance window, run the pre-approved database migration script.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully executes the schema migration.

nodes.task_description: Perform post-migration data integrity checks to ensure no data was lost or corrupted.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs validation queries and confirms data integrity.

nodes.task_description: Bring the application back online and remove the maintenance page.
